title: Attack Resistant Public Registries
tagline: Privacy-preserving blockchain for sovereign order and decentralised governance.
summary: Reference designs and an open implementation for public-good registries (names, identities, content) that resist coercion and capture.
description: Public registries — DNS, package indexes, software bills of materials — are repeatedly captured by the entities that operate them. We are funding work on registry primitives that any Logos community can stand up: a Codex-backed key/value store, signed updates, multi-witness attestation, and clear capture-resistance guarantees with a published threat model. Deliverables: spec, reference implementation, integration guide for at least one of {DNS, package index, software attestations}.
